---
title: Namespace
description: Prefix all cache keys at the plugin level.
icon: Tag
---

Prefixes every cache key with a fixed string. Prefer `cache.namespace()` for runtime namespacing — use this plugin when you want the prefix baked into the plugin pipeline at creation time.

## Setup

```ts
import { namespacePlugin } from "@justwant/cache/plugins/namespace";
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { memoryAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/memory";

const cache = createCache({
  adapter: memoryAdapter(),
  plugins: [namespacePlugin({ prefix: "v1" })],
});
```

The separator between prefix and key is always `:`. A key `"user"` becomes `"v1:user"`. If the prefix already ends with `:`, no extra separator is added.

## Options

| Option | Type | Required | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| `prefix` | `string` | Yes | String to prepend to every key |

## Example — version-based invalidation

```ts
// Bump the prefix to invalidate all cached data in one change
const cache = createCache({
  adapter: redisAdapter({ redis }),
  plugins: [namespacePlugin({ prefix: "v2" })],
});
```
